---
title: "Foundation Stack"
pagetitle: "Foundation Stack"
description: "Citable knowledge on adolescent PPCS aerobic exercise prescription — PMID-backed tables, methods, and clinical SOPs."
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [installment, date, title, description, pillar]
  field-display-names:
    installment: ID
    date: Published
    title: Title
    description: Summary
    pillar: Pillar
  feed: true
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.fs-hero}
## Foundation Stack

**One topic · four pillars · knowledge that compounds**

Long-form, PMID-backed installments on **adolescent PPCS aerobic exercise prescription** — how protocols set intensity, how measurement choices affect home delivery, and what clinicians can write on Monday morning.

**6 installments published · series ongoing** · Latest: [Wrist HR vs Chest Strap: What Community PPCS Prescription Assumes](posts/pillar2-006-wearable-hr-error-margins/index.html)

Written by **Guang Li (Jack)** — graduate athletic training researcher. Primary audience: clinicians and researchers; parents can start from each installment’s **SOP** and plain-language notes. [About this series →](/about.html)
:::

## Why this series exists

Published protocols often disagree on **how hard**, **how long**, and **how to monitor** sub-symptom aerobic exercise after concussion. Community settings rarely match trial equipment or supervision. Each installment isolates one operational problem, puts the evidence in tables, and ends with an actionable SOP — so this URL stays a citable reference surface for teaching and practice, not a feed of disposable posts.

## Four pillars

| Pillar | Code | Prefix | What you get |
|--------|------|--------|----------------|
| **Top-journal reproduction** | `reproduce` | `pillar1-` | Audit landmark RCTs: dose reported vs dose performed |
| **Methods comparison** | `methods` | `pillar2-` | Protocol comparison, measurement, coding rules |
| **Synthetic experiments** | `synth` | `pillar3-` | Priors, dashboards, dose–heterogeneity experiments |
| **Pitfalls & SOP** | `sop` | `pillar4-` | Checklists for AT/PT; plain-language notes for parents |

Installment IDs use `pillar{N}-{seq}-{slug}` (e.g. `pillar2-001-six-protocols-comparison`).

## Fixed article structure

1. **Problem** · 2. **Comparison table** · 3. **Disagreements** · 4. **Methods** · 5. **SOP** · 6. **Limitations**

## Published installments

[Clinical tools](/tools/index.html) · [Author home](https://guanglab.org/) · [About](/about.html)
